_readme: Keys are 'country_code|species_code' (shown in the Notes column). Each entry can have 'resolved' (true/false) and/or 'notes' (text).

CP|brnboo.notes: Test checklist by MJI, now deleted

CP|houspa.notes: Test checklist by MJI, now deleted

AO|eurmag1.notes: AGREE -- had been marked escapee; well documented at least to genus; likely ship assist?

AR|eucdov.notes: DISAGREE -- reversed to UNCONFIRMED; this and many records from Brazil set to re-review as likely African Collared-Doves

BS|yebpar1.notes: AGREE -- photo of bird correctly tagged Escapee

BE|dalpel1.notes: AGREE -- photo of bird correctly (or at least reasonably) tagged Provisional

BZ|rucrob1.notes: AGREE -- amazing outlier record as country first; many records, many photos

BR|sora.notes: AGREE -- amazing outlier record as country first; photos

CL|varfly.notes: AGREE -- amazing outlier record as country first; photos

CP|amebit.notes: AGREE -- amazing outlier record as country first; photos
